prompt: A dreamy fantasy wedding collage in a soft pastel, high-detail anime game-art style, featuring two chibi lalafell-like newlyweds in an ornate chapel filled with warm bokeh lights, pale blue and blush tones, flowers, and floating pink petals. The central focus is a close-up side view of the bride and groom leaning in for a kiss, with the bride on the left and the groom on the right. The bride is a tiny elf-eared fantasy character with short dark brown hair, round cheeks with faint blush marks, and a large white floral headpiece made of 2 white roses, small white blossoms, and green leaves, plus a long white veil flowing behind her. She wears an elegant long-sleeved white lace wedding dress with delicate embroidery and a jeweled neckline. The groom is a tiny elf-eared fantasy character with short spiky brown hair, white lily flowers tucked into his hair, and red tassel earrings; he wears a white formal wedding suit with subtle layered tailoring and a white boutonniere with green leaves. Surrounding the main kiss scene are 3 tilted framed inset photos with cream-colored borders: 1 top-left portrait of the groom reaching his hand toward the viewer, 1 top-right portrait of the bride showing her hand forward with a ring visible, and 1 bottom inset two-shot of the couple seated together outdoors in soft sunlight. Add ornate swirling golden decorative lines and glowing sparkles weaving across the composition, with a bouquet cluster of pale cream and blush roses in the lower right foreground. The background is an opulent chapel interior with chandeliers, candles, soft floral arrangements, and luminous pastel haze. Make it romantic, ethereal, polished, and sentimental, with a luxurious wedding album feel and a vertical smartphone-friendly composition.
